notes: WGSL-backed runtime fixture. The governed lane regenerates layout.csl + pe_program.csl from simulator-plan.template.json compileTargets[].sourceWgslPath, then invokes cs_python + SdkRuntime through this command. The runner verifies tanh-based GELU against NumPy over 16 PEs x 1024 f32 elements and writes an explicit_simulator_trace.
